news.title: Governor commutes death sentence of man whose accomplice fired fatal shot
news.snippet: Alabama Gov. Kay Ivey has commuted the death sentence of a 75-year-old inmate who was set to be executed this week even though he was not in the room when the fatal shot was fired.

news.title: Woman injured in Montgomery structure fire
news.snippet: A woman was injured in a structure fire Friday, according to Montgomery Fire Rescue. Units responded to the 400 block of Godfrey Street.

news.title: Alabama Air Force major killed in refueling aircraft crash in Iran
news.snippet: A family mourns the loss of an Air Force crew member killed when a refueling aircraft crashed in Iran.

news.title: High school student killed 68-year-old woman in random attack at her home, police say
news.snippet: Police arrested Anthony DeMayo, an 18-year-old Bishop Fenwick High School senior, on Thursday. DeMayo was seen walking down a road carrying a weapon.

news.title: 2 more sentenced in Montgomery mail theft conspiracy
news.snippet: Two additional defendants have been sentenced in a mail theft and bank fraud conspiracy involving four people, Acting U.S. Attorney Kevin Davidson announced.

news.title: 1 dead in Montgomery motorcycle crash
news.snippet: First responders found the driver of the motorcycle, identified as Bryson Davis Painter, 27, fatally injured and pronounced him dead on the scene.

news.title: Montgomery mayor says city is 'strong' in 2026 State of the City address
news.snippet: Reed said he expects the city to make additional announcements about infrastructure improvements, economic investments and public safety initiatives.

news.title: Pedestrian hit, killed in Montgomery County
news.snippet: A woman has died after being hit by two different cars Wednesday evening, according to the Alabama Law Enforcement Agency.

news.title: Man killed in early-morning crash in Montgomery
news.snippet: A man was killed Saturday morning in a single-vehicle crash, according to the Montgomery Police Department.

government.title: Mayor Steven L. Reed Presents FY 2026 Budget Proposal
government.snippet: The proposed budget totals $353.2 million, representing a 6.5% increase from the previous year. Budgets are where our values show up in real terms.

government.title: What to know about Montgomery's historic proposed 2026 budget
government.snippet: Montgomery's proposed 2026 budget is $353.2 million dollars, a record high number. The mayor, his cabinet, and the city council all see it as a step forward.

government.title: Montgomery City Council Passes Record $353.2 Million Budget
government.snippet: Montgomery City Council passed the record $353.2 million budget. A proposed 10% raise for firefighters was denied in the final vote.

government.title: Montgomery County Commission Approves FY2026 Budget
government.snippet: The budget includes approximately $53 million for general government operations, $60 million for public safety and $21 million for highways and roads.

government.title: Montgomery City Council approves record budget
government.snippet: The Montgomery city council approved a budget for the 2026 fiscal year. The $353 million spending plan passed on a vote of 6 to 3.

government.title: Montgomery city and county pass 2026 budgets — what to know
government.snippet: The city's new budget increased $21.6 million or about 6.5% over the previous budget. Montgomery Mayor Steven Reed told the City Council this is a historic moment.

government.title: Montgomery passes largest budget in City's history
government.snippet: Members of the Montgomery City Council passed the largest budget in City history for fiscal year 2026 on Tuesday. Council push to oversee millions in fallout funds fails.

safety.title: Mayor Steven Reed highlights public safety during monthly briefing
safety.snippet: Detailing out numbers from 2025 like 61 homicides and decreases in violent, non-violent, and overall crime. Down 25, 12, and nearly 14% respectively.

safety.title: Montgomery mayor discusses crime, city developments at monthly briefing
safety.snippet: Violent crime decreased by more than 25%. Non-violent crime declined by 12%. Overall crime down nearly 14%.

safety.title: Montgomery mayor addresses public safety, city developments
safety.snippet: We urge Congress to vote against house resolution 32 because it could divert critical resources from public safety, reduce trust needed for effective policing.

safety.title: ALEA special agent injured in officer-involved shooting
safety.snippet: An investigation is underway after a special agent assigned to the Alabama Law Enforcement Agency's SWAT Team was struck by gunfire in an incident.

safety.title: Proposed bills would allow ALEA to take over understaffed police departments
safety.snippet: A determination that staffing levels are at critically low levels in Montgomery and Birmingham police departments prompted the legislative action.

safety.title: Man in life-threatening condition after Montgomery shooting
safety.snippet: A man is fighting for his life after a Friday morning shooting, the Montgomery Police Department confirms.

safety.title: Montgomery police chief lays out 2025 homicide numbers
safety.snippet: Montgomery Police Chief Jim Graboys gave an update on the department's progress with 2025's remaining homicide cases during the monthly briefing.

safety.title: Montgomery mayor says city is 'strong' in 2026 State of the City address
safety.snippet: Reed said the city saw a drop in overall crime of about 15% in 2025. Non-violent crime was down more than 25% and violent crime decreased significantly.

safety.title: 2025 shooting case upgraded to homicide after victim dies
safety.snippet: A 2025 shooting case has been upgraded to a homicide investigation after the victim died of his injuries, according to the Montgomery Police Department.

events.title: Details on the biggest events coming to Montgomery in 2026
events.snippet: Montgomery Oyster Festival is typically held in September at Old Alabama Town. A variety of oysters and entertainment draw large crowds annually.

events.title: The Rundown: A High-Flying Weekend Ahead
events.snippet: The 2026 Sacred Arts Festival: Made by Hand, Moved by Spirit is happening this weekend at First United Methodist Church in Montgomery.

events.title: The Rundown: Characters, Community & Black History
events.snippet: From family fun to community celebrations, there is a lot happening this weekend in Montgomery. Characters are popping up all over the city.

events.title: What to do in Montgomery for March 12-18
events.snippet: Shakespeare's Much Ado About Nothing: March 19-April 5, 2026 on the Festival Stage. ReCON$truXion: April 23-May 3, 2026.

events.title: The Rundown: Weekend Vibes for You & Your Valentine
events.snippet: Valentine's weekend is here with events happening from Feb. 13-15 across Montgomery.

events.title: Selma Bridge Crossing Jubilee full schedule of events released
events.snippet: Days of reflection, debate, film, music, marching and more are ahead from Selma Bridge Crossing Jubilee, a nonprofit 501(c)(3) organization.

events.title: What events are coming to Riverwalk Stadium this year?
events.snippet: The Montgomery Biscuits Fan Fest at Riverwalk Stadium features themed game nights including special events throughout the 2026 season.

events.title: What to do in Montgomery for March 5-11
events.snippet: Shakespeare's Much Ado About Nothing: March 19-April 5, 2026 on the Festival Stage. Various events and activities throughout the week.

events.title: Global Dance Festival held in Montgomery
events.snippet: The Global Dance Festival brought together dancers and cultural performers from around the world for a celebration in Montgomery.

infrastructure.title: Senate backs bill that expands Alabama Public Service Commission
infrastructure.snippet: The Alabama Senate signed onto a bill that would overhaul the structure and governance of the Alabama Public Service Commission (APSC).

infrastructure.title: Rep. Shomari Figures secures millions in federal funding for major Montgomery projects
infrastructure.snippet: Funding secured for the Alabama Capital Maxwell Gateway Project and the Montgomery Regional Tech and Innovation Ecosystem Initiative.

infrastructure.title: Montgomery County Commission approves $156M budget for 2026
infrastructure.snippet: The county budget caps out at just over $156.5 million and focuses on economic development, public safety, and infrastructure. Includes $53 million for operations.

infrastructure.title: Construction projects to improve Montgomery move closer to completion
infrastructure.snippet: Projects range from refurbished community centers to a new data center. Here's where they stand as the city continues investing in infrastructure.

infrastructure.title: Alabama governor overhauls state's largest water utility amid controversy
infrastructure.snippet: Alabama governor Kay Ivey sided with the state legislature by signing a bill that will overhaul the Birmingham Water Works Board.
